details: Polymarket-trader-apis is a combosquat of the legitimate Polymarket prediction-market platform. The package's main entry point (index.js) fetches remote code from hxxps://svganchordev[.]net/icons/108 and executes it via the Function constructor with full Node.js runtime access (require, process, Buffer, console, setTimeout). The fetched payload (data.credits) runs in a context that includes all Node.js globals, enabling arbitrary code execution. The package declares dependencies that form a credential-theft toolkit: @primno/dpapi (Windows credential extraction), better-sqlite3 and sqlite3 (browser credential-database access), node-machine-id (device fingerprinting), and socket[.]io-client (real-time C2 channel). The README describes a fake Polymarket trading utility, but the code performs no trading functions — it is a remote-code-execution dropper. C2: svganchordev[.]net, path /icons/{token}.
